prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to environmental regulations and waste management practices, which apply across the UK, including Scotland. However, specific implementation details may vary due to devolved environmental governance in Scotland, but the overarching principles remain relevant.
